college.name: JCT College of Arts and Science

about.description: JCT College of Arts and Science is a newly established institution in Coimbatore offering undergraduate programs in computing, commerce, and management. The college focuses on industry-oriented learning, modern infrastructure, and skill development for real-world applications.

eligibility.ug-programs: 10+2 from a recognized board (CBSE, ISC, Tamil Nadu or equivalent).

admissions.selection: Merit-based admission (no national entrance exam required)

courses.name: B.Sc Computer Science
courses.description: Focuses on programming, software development, and computing fundamentals.

courses.name: B.Sc Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning
courses.description: Covers AI, data analysis, and machine learning applications.

courses.name: BCA (Bachelor of Computer Applications)
courses.description: Prepares students for careers in software development and IT industries.

courses.name: B.Com Logistics and Supply Chain Management
courses.description: Focuses on commerce with logistics and supply chain specialization.

courses.name: BBA Logistics
courses.description: Covers business administration with logistics and shipping specialization.

placements.description: The institution provides career guidance, internship opportunities, and industry interaction sessions. As the college is relatively new, placement data is still developing.

campus_life.environment: Vibrant campus with focus on extracurricular and overall student development.

faq.q: What courses are available at JCT Arts and Science?
faq.a: The college offers B.Sc (CS, AI & ML), BCA, B.Com Logistics, and BBA Logistics programs.

faq.q: Is there an entrance exam required?
faq.a: No, admission is based on 12th marks (merit-based).

faq.q: Does the college provide hostel facilities?
faq.a: Yes, hostel facilities are available for students.
Yes, the college provides placement support, internships, and industry interaction, though it is still growing.
